---
title: "Continuous Deployment: Python (hatch + quartodoc)"
---

Placeholder for using GitHub actions to run the full example of,
testing, building docs, build package, publish package, publish doc site.

- hatch build: <https://www.pyopensci.org/python-package-guide/package-structure-code/publish-python-package-pypi-conda.html#>
- quartodoc:<https://machow.github.io/quartodoc>
